creator: niedbalski@gmail.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	latex-babel/
#	latex-babel/Makefile
#	latex-babel/pkg-descr
#	latex-babel/pkg-plist
#	latex-babel/distinfo
#
echo c - latex-babel/
mkdir -p latex-babel/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - latex-babel/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >latex-babel/Makefile << 'END-of-latex-babel/Makefile'
XPORTNAME=	latex-babel
XPORTVERSION=    1
XPORTREVISION=   1
XCATEGORIES=     print
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.ctan.org/pub/tex-archive/macros/latex/required/ 	
XDISTFILES=      babel.zip
XUSE_ZIP=        yes
XDIST_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}
X
XMAINTAINER=     niedbalski@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=        A LaTeX package system for supports of multilingual
typesetting.
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=  unzip:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/unzip \
X		mktexlsr:${PORTSDIR}/print/teTeX-base \
X		latex-supertabular:${PORTSDIR}/print/latex-supertabular \
X		${TEXMFLOCAL_LSR}:${PORTSDIR}/print/tex-texmflocal
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=    latex:${PORTSDIR}/print/teTeX-base \
X                ${TEXMFLOCAL_LSR}:${PORTSDIR}/print/tex-texmflocal
XPLIST_SUB=      TEXMFLOCAL=${TEXMFLOCAL} MKTEXLSR=${MKTEXLSR} \
X                CLASSDIR=${CLASSDIR}
XUSE_GMAKE=      YES
X
XTEXMFLOCAL=     share/texmf-local
XTEXMFLOCAL_LSR= ${LOCALBASE}/${TEXMFLOCAL}/ls-R
XMKTEXLSR=       ${LOCALBASE}/bin/mktexlsr
XTEX_BIN=        ${LOCALBASE}/bin/latex
XCLASSDIR=       ${TEXMFLOCAL}/tex/latex/${PORTNAME:S/^latex-//}
XWRKSRC=         ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME:S/^latex-//}
X
XDEFAULT_LANGUAGE_FILES=	UKenglish USenglish afrikaans albanian
american athnum austrian babel bahasa bahasam basque breton british
bulgarian catalan croatian czech danish  dutch english esperanto
estonian finnish francais galician germanb greek grmath hebcal hebfont
hebrew hebrew_newcode hebrew_oldcode hebrew_p icelandic interlingua
irish italian latin lsorbian magyar naustrian ngermanb norsk polish
portuges romanian	romanidx russianb samin scottish serbian slovak
slovene spanish swedish turkish ukraineb usorbian welsh
X
XDOC_FILES=	blplain.tex	bplain.tex	glbst.tex	glromidx.tex
X
Xdo-extract:
X	${MKDIR} ${WRKSRC}
X	@unzip -qo ${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR}/${DISTFILES} -d ${WRKSRC}
X
Xdo-build:
X	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${TEX_BIN} babel.ins
X
Xdo-install:
X	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/${CLASSDIR}
X	cp -Rp ${WRKSRC}/babel* ${PREFIX}/${CLASSDIR}
X	cp ${WRKSRC}/user.drv ${PREFIX}/${CLASSDIR}
X
X.if !defined(LANGUAGE_SUPPORT)
X
X.for subdir in ${DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_FILES}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${subdir}.sty ${PREFIX}/${CLASSDIR}
X.endfor
X
X.else
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${LANGUAGE_SUPPORT}.sty ${PREFIX}/${CLASSDIR}
X.endif
X
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${DOC_FILES:S@^@${WRKSRC}/@} ${DOCSDIR}
X.endif
X
Xpre-install:
X	@echo "For specific language support use (e.g make
LANGUAGE_SUPPORT="spanish")"
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${MKTEXLSR}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
X
END-of-latex-babel/Makefile
echo x - latex-babel/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >latex-babel/pkg-descr << 'END-of-latex-babel/pkg-descr'
XBabel system supports multilingual typesetting for TeX.
XThis version of the Babel system is compatible with LaTeX2e.
X
XWWW:http://www.ctan.org/tex-archive/macros/latex/required/babel
END-of-latex-babel/pkg-descr
echo x - latex-babel/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >latex-babel/pkg-plist << 'END-of-latex-babel/pkg-plist'
